name: copilot-configs-sync
description: Automated GitHub Actions workflow to sync GitHub Copilot configuration files from awesome-copilot repository
author: Your Name

scripts.validate:workflow: npx --yes js-yaml .github/workflows/sync-copilot-configs.yml > /dev/null && echo 'Workflow YAML is valid'
scripts.help: echo '📖 For documentation, see: README.md, docs/setup.md, docs/configuration.md, docs/troubleshooting.md'
